description_long: This is a two-story modern suburban house with a pink and white exterior, featuring a flat, gray-tiled roof and a small rooftop terrace. The front facade includes a garage, a main entryway with a covered porch, and landscaped garden beds with shrubs and a tree. The side and rear walls are mostly solid with minimal windows, emphasizing privacy, while the front and rooftop areas are more open and inviting. The house has a mix of rectangular and square windows, with a large wooden gate or door at the rear. The landscaping includes a paved driveway, a walkway, and a small lawn area. The overall design is clean and geometric, with a focus on functional outdoor spaces and modern aesthetics.
description: A modern two-story house with a pink and white exterior, flat gray roof, garage, landscaped front yard, and rooftop terrace.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, main entryway with covered porch, landscaped garden, and a tree.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the solid wall, minimal windows, and partial view of the rooftop terrace and landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a large wooden gate or door, small windows, and the back of the rooftop terrace.
description_view_3: Right side view with a solid wall, a few small windows, and a clear look at the front landscaping and tree.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with steps, single main door, adjacent garage, landscaped approach, and minimal decorative elements.
